prompt_text:
### Demographics: 69-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.2 kg; Height 165.6 cm; BMI 19.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 218mg/dL; 6 months ago 221mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 206mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.7kg; 9 months ago 51.1kg; 6 months ago 51.2kg; 3 months ago 50.9kg; current 53.2kg), Height (12 months ago 165.6cm; 9 months ago 165.6cm; 6 months ago 165.6cm; 3 months ago 165.6cm; current 165.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 61mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; current 57mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 71mg/g; 9 months ago 77mg/g; 6 months ago 79mg/g; 3 months ago 86mg/g; current 82mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 140mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 13.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.88 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
